invariant_specs.public_safe_statement: Provider output is not accepted evidence.
Retrieval result cannot promote Perspective state.
Codex result is not durable state.
Dataset row is not training data by default.
GitHub PR is not Core decision.
Git Ledger packet is not commit, proof, or product-write.
Private identifier is not canonical label.

positive_boundary_cases.statement: Candidate is not proof.

Retrieval result cannot promote Perspective state.
Codex result is not durable state.
Dataset row is not training data by default.
Feedback is not truth.
Git ref is not authority.
GitHub PR is not Core decision.
CI pass is not truth.
Smoke pass is not truth.
Git Ledger packet is not commit, proof, or product-write.
Product-write remains parked by #686.

finding.public_safe_summary: Blocked private/raw fixture markers are represented by safe placeholders only.
Theorem prover runtime authority claim was blocked.

deterministic_repeatability_example.repeatability_summary: Same fixture input produces same invariant ids, order, and fingerprint.
